channel.title: GPU on Kovasky Buezo | Software Developer, Cybersecurity Enthusiast
channel.description: Recent content in GPU on Kovasky Buezo | Software Developer, Cybersecurity Enthusiast

item.title: How to passthrough an RTX 5000 series GPU to Proxmox
item.description: Intro I recently acquired an RTX 5060 GPU and had to look at multiple sources in order to get passthrough working. This will outline all the steps I took in order to get it working on my Dell Poweredge T440 server. Update At the time of the post edit, Proxmox 9 has been released. I have updated my host to the new version and used the update tool for RTX 5060 series🔗 provided by Nvidia.
